honestLimitations: No model or adapter was trained in this cycle.
The committed fixture validates the evaluator, not model intelligence.
Eight held-out cases and eight preference pairs are schema seeds, not sufficient evidence for promotion.
The benchmark must be expanded and kept hidden from training before model comparisons.
nextPriorities: Run the pinned open-weight base and first QLoRA adapter against the benchmark with identical decoding.
Expand licensed adversarial metacognition cases and create a private hidden split.
Train a small metacognitive controller or DPO adapter only after enough verified preference pairs exist.
